treeDensity.title: Tree Density
treeDensity.tooltip: Controls the amount of extra trees on Timber Hearth

grassDensity.title: Grass Density
grassDensity.tooltip: Controls the amount of extra grass tufts on Timber Hearth

cloudDensity.title: Cloud Density
cloudDensity.tooltip: Controls the amount of clouds around Timber Hearth

fireflyEnabled.title: Fireflies Visible
fireflyEnabled.tooltip: Controls the time frame when fireflies are visible

fireflyDensity.title: Firefly Density
fireflyDensity.tooltip: Controls the amount of firefly emitters on Timber Hearth

treeOcclusionOptimisation.title: Tree Occlusion Optimisation
treeOcclusionOptimisation.tooltip: When enabled trees which are hidden from the camera's view are disabled

extraTreesGrowthPercent.title: Extra Trees Current Growth
extraTreesGrowthPercent.tooltip: 0% = smallest (saplings), 100% = full size for the current max-size mode. Auto-growth moves this while the multiplier and speed are above zero; you can also drag it manually.

extraTreesGrowthSpeedPercentPerSec.title: Extra Trees Auto-Growth Speed
extraTreesGrowthSpeedPercentPerSec.tooltip: How many percentage points per second are added to Current Growth while auto-growth is active (multiplier > 0).

extraTreesGrowthIntensity.title: Extra Trees Auto-Growth Multiplier
extraTreesGrowthIntensity.tooltip: 0 = auto-growth paused. Multiplies Auto-Growth Speed when advancing the Current Growth slider.

extraTreesRandomPerTreeMax.title: Random max size per tree (1–14)
extraTreesRandomPerTreeMax.tooltip: Off: same max size for every tree (only the overall scale slider applies). On: each tree rolls its own max size factor between 1 and 14; use Randomize below to re-roll.

extraTreesGlobalScale.title: Extra Trees Overall Scale
extraTreesGlobalScale.tooltip: Uniform scale multiplier for all mod trees (saplings and full size).

extraTreesPerTreeScaleAction.title: Per-tree random size (1 to 14)
extraTreesPerTreeScaleAction.tooltip: Only applies when "Random max size per tree" is on. Choose Randomize once to roll a new random size factor per tree, then switch back to Idle if you want to randomize again later.

extraTreesResetGrowthAction.title: Restart growth from saplings
options: Reset to saplings (min size, grow again)
extraTreesResetGrowthAction.tooltip: Choose Reset once to set all extra trees back to minimum growth (sapling size). Switch back to Idle before using Reset again.
